name: eval specs: ts eval specs tagged bootstrap_seed:true per O-1 seed corpus convention
command: for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/specs"/g-ts-[0-9][0-9][0-9].json; do grep -E "\"bootstrap_seed\":true" "$f" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $f missing bootstrap_seed" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
